title: Ventas (VTR) Partners With Operators for Senior Housing Growth
text: Ventas (VTR) teams up with expert operators to enhance the performance of 26 independent living communities.

title: Ventas Announces Three Proven High Performing Operators to Manage 26 Independent Living Communities in Attractive Markets to Drive Occupancy and Performance
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--In conjunction with previously scheduled investor meetings, Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today identified three proven senior housing operators who will take over management of 26 high-quality independent living communities owned by the Company (the “Communities”) and located in Texas, Florida and California. Ventas is expanding its successful existing relationships with the three managers (the “Managers”) to increase occupancy and performance i.

title: Ventas: A High-Quality Entry Point For Quality Healthcare
text: Ventas, Inc. is a highly-rated healthcare REIT with above-average fundamental safety and a good yield. The company has a strong portfolio in the healthcare space, including senior housing, outpatient medical providers, and hospital and care facilities. While the healthcare REIT sector has underperformed, Ventas has outperformed its peers and has the scale and safety to navigate the market.

title: Ventas: Time For This REIT To Capitalize On The Silver Tsunami
text: REITs offer total return on investment through dividends and share price appreciation based on real estate ownership. Healthcare REITs like Ventas, Inc. are set to benefit from the aging U.S. population, resulting in a surge in demand for senior housing. Senior housing has seen a surge in supply over the past few years combined with a global pandemic, but the tide is beginning to turn in Ventas' favor.

title: Ventas' (VTR) Q2 FFO Beats, SHOP NOI Up, '23 View Revised
text: Ventas (VTR) posts solid Q2 results on better-than-anticipated revenues. The same-store cash NOI rises year over year on strong performance across the portfolio.

title: Compared to Estimates, Ventas (VTR) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Ventas (VTR) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Ventas (VTR) Q2 FFO and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Ventas (VTR) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.75 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.74 per share. This compares to FFO of $0.72 per share a year ago.

title: Ventas Reports 2023 Second Quarter Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today reported results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023. title: Is a Beat in Store for Ventas (VTR) This Earnings Season?
text: Favorable operating trends of the senior housing operating portfolio and robust demand for its life-science real-estate assets are likely to have benefited Ventas' (VTR) Q2 earnings.
